title: helichrysum bracteiferum subsp. tsaratananense
intro: Helichrysum bracteiferum subsp. tsaratananense, also known as the Madagascar Perched Everlast, is a sub-species of the Helichrysum plant, native to the Tsaratanana mountain range in Madagascar. It is a flowering plant that has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, including wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues, with its health benefits including reduced inflammation, improved wound healing, and enhanced immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and topical creams, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed and utilized for therapeutic purposes.
